selectedCleanupCandidate.whyCleanupEligible: Obvious unreferenced backup under src/archive/; listed in repodiet-ground-truth.json as automatic delete; not in mustKeep; reversible by restoring the single deleted file from main history.

alternativesRejectedForThisRun.reason: Unused Clock import already removed on current main — not eligible.
Valid but deferred; keep this controlled run to one archive delete.

expectedPrTitle: RepoDiet: repair 0 files, remove 1 safe file

githubAppInstallationTokenUse.source: installation access token minted in-memory via App JWT
githubAppInstallationTokenUse.tokenHandling: Held only in process memory for the delivery request; not logged; not persisted to durable store or artifacts.

buyerApprovalBoundary: A2A task remains unpaid/unreleased until buyer explicitly approves the delivered PR evidence. No escrow release on PR-open alone.
escrowReleaseBoundary: Funds release only after buyer acceptance of the verified cleanup PR (A2A accept → release). Opening or updating the PR does not release escrow.

receiptGeneration.commerceReceipt: SignedReceiptV1 via REPODIET_OPERATOR_PRIVATE_KEY after successful paid delivery path
receiptGeneration.greenPrReceipt: Green PR receipt via REPODIET_RECEIPT_PRIVATE_KEY when contracted Green PR monitoring finalizes

attestationGeneration.constraint: Must be a separate signing identity from the receipt signer

duplicateExecutionProtection: assertCleanupDeliveryContext rejects stale base SHA / changed files
idempotency on quote/task binding prevents double charge
single cleanup branch prefix + open-PR warnings
installation token scoped to the target installation only
idempotencyBehavior: Re-running delivery against the same approved task/quote must not create a second escrow capture; PR creation is gated on live base SHA matching the scan commit and validated edit hashes.
rollbackProcedure: Close the RepoDiet cleanup PR without merging
Confirm main remains at pinnedBaseCommit (or later unrelated commits) with OldDashboard.backup.tsx still present if PR was never merged
If mistakenly merged: revert the merge commit on main
executionGate: Do not execute until operator explicitly starts the controlled delivery run after queue reconciliation and GitHub App probe PASS.
